completed_tasks.name: Freeze target subset and engagement criterion
Replan Phase 19 against hard-38 truth and create execution checkpoint
Start minimal upstream seed-opening implementation
completed_tasks.progress: Added query-shape seeding module and thin wiring in hybrid substrate/runtime, but no final tests, proof, or phase execute artifacts yet.

remaining_tasks.name: Integrate external research findings into Phase 19 seam choice
Add targeted tests and bounded verification for query-shape seeding
Write Phase 19 execute artifacts and verdict

blockers.description: Phase 19 should not continue blind because new external jackpot research may materially change the seam or stop the phase.
blockers.workaround: Pause now, ingest the research, then either refresh Phase 19 planning or resume execute with the same bounded seam.

human_actions_pending.action: Paste the new external research findings / jackpot answers.
human_actions_pending.context: Phase 19 is intentionally paused so the new research can reshape the seam choice before more code is written.

decisions.decision: Do not close Phase 19 before the new research arrives.
decisions.rationale: The phase is mid-execute and the external research may legitimately change the minimal upstream mechanism or stop rule.

decisions.decision: Keep slice taxonomy as diagnostic/experimental taxonomy, not broad runtime ontology.
decisions.rationale: This helps targeting and stop-rules without recreating the old system's complexity trap.

decisions.decision: Treat hard-38 truth as locked gating evidence.
decisions.rationale: Current paid replay remains 3/38 with retrieval_failure 29/38, selector_engaged_cases 0, and aggregation_safety_abstentions 0.

next_action: After the user pastes the research, re-evaluate Phase 19 seam choice first; then either refresh `/gsd-plan-phase 19` or continue `/gsd-execute-phase 19` with targeted tests and artifacts.
context_notes: Phase 19 is the first phase where the correct move is not more blind retrieval coding but explicit falsification of whether query-shape-conditioned upstream seeding can touch the hard residual bucket at all. Do not confuse local wiring or route notes with real engagement.
